J:\CODE\CMAKE\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\auroraOS.elf.dir/objects.a
J:\CODE\MINGW64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\auroraOS.elf.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\auroraOS.elf.dir\objects1.rsp
J:\CODE\MINGW64\bin\g++.exe  -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfloat-abi=soft -ffreestanding -fno-builtin -fno-common -Wall -Wextra -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fno-threadsafe-statics -O2 -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\auroraOS.elf.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o auroraOS.elf.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libauroraOS.elf.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\auroraOS.elf.dir\linkLibs.rsp
